data.biography: Alexandra Beaton is a Canadian actress born in Toronto, best known for playing Emily on the teen drama series The Next Step. She began performing as a child, with her early role in the 2006 film 300, and later starred in the Lifetime TV movie The Cheerleader Escort and the Syfy film Bring It On: Cheer or Die. She has also appeared in the films Luckiest Girl Alive and Single All the Way, and plays Elyse Russo in the Netflix series Finding Her Edge.
data.name: Alexandra Beaton
Điện Quang Omega
data.overview: Lấy bối cảnh Trái Đất chưa từng có siêu anh hùng hay quái thú, một người ngoài hành tinh bị mất trí nhớ, bất ngờ rơi xuống từ bầu trời. Anh lấy tên Sorato và bắt đầu khám phá thế giới loài người đầy cảm xúc lẫn mâu thuẫn. Khi những con quái thú khổng lồ lần đầu xuất hiện, Sorato vô thức nhớ lại sứ mệnh của mình và biến thân thành Ultraman Omega, sử dụng vũ khí đặc trưng Omega Slugger để chiến đấu bảo vệ Trái Đất.

data.biography: 付航，1994年出生于北京市，中国内地脱口秀男演员、影视演员。2018年，进入脱口秀行业。2019年11月，通过短视频平台打开知名度，获得更多演出机会；同年，开启个人全国巡演，这是他第一次举办个人脱口秀专场演出。2020年，参加腾讯视频选拔类真人秀《认真的嘎嘎们》。2023年，主演的喜剧电影《抬头见喜》在爱奇艺、腾讯视频、优酷平台同步上线。2024年，参加爱奇艺单口喜剧竞演节目《喜剧之王单口季》并获得年度总冠军。
data.name: 付航

data.biography: 付航，1994 年出生於北京市，中國內地棟篤笑男演員、影視演員。2018 年，進入棟篤笑行業。2019 年 11 月，透過 透過 通過短視頻平台打開知名度，獲得更多演出機會；同年，開啟個人全國巡演，這是他第一次舉辦個人棟篤笑專場演出。2020 年，參加騰訊視頻選拔類真人秀《認真的嘎嘎們》。2023 年，主演的喜劇電影《抬頭見喜》在愛奇藝、騰訊視頻、優酷平台同步上線。2024 年，參加愛奇藝單口喜劇競演節目《喜劇之王單口季》並獲得年度總冠軍。
data.name: 付航

data.biography: Cui Yuxin is a Chinese singer and actor born on July 6, 1996, in Liaoning Province. A graduate of Shanxi University, he entered the entertainment industry in 2017 after appearing on Tencent’s talent program The Coming One, and made his acting debut in the 2019 film Just Met You.
data.name: Cui Yuxin

data.biography: 崔雨鑫，男，《明日之子》盛世美颜赛道选手。2017年，他参演了魔力TV旗下的唯美纯爱影像系列短片《小情书》中《三个人的友谊》，2019年，他在由康洪雷、张寒冰执导的《陆战之王》中饰演“霹雳娇娃”郭辉，2020年，他在网剧《唐人街探案》及电影《唐人街探案3》中饰演了医疗集团主席独子，“五大灵童”战队成员程天顺。同年，由其主演的网剧《情歌半首》,《再见青春》也在第二季度上线播出。
data.name: 崔雨鑫

data.biography: 崔雨鑫，男，《明日之子》盛世美顏賽道選手。2017 年，他參演了魔力 TV 旗下的唯美純愛影像系列短片《小情書》中《三個人的友誼》，2019 年，他在由康洪雷、張寒冰執導的《陸戰之王》中飾演“霹靂嬌娃”郭輝，2020 年，他在網劇《唐人街探案》及電影《唐人街探案 3》中飾演了醫療集團主席獨子，“五大靈童”戰隊成員程天順。同年，由其主演的網劇《情歌半首》, 《再見青春》也在第二季度上線播出。
data.name: 崔雨鑫

data.biography: Siti Aqila Nur Fadilla Herby, commonly known as Aqila Herby (born June 11, 2009), is an Indonesian actress, model, and singer. She began her career in the entertainment industry by participating in the Little Miss Indonesia competition in 2013, where she reached the Top 7 finalists before being eliminated.
data.name: Aqila Herby

data.biography: Carl Ng Ka-Lung (Chinese: 吳嘉龍; born March 27, 1976) is a Hong Kong actor and model. He is the son of Richard Ng.
data.name: Carl Ng Ka-Lung

data.biography: 吳嘉龍是香港著名老演員吳耀漢之子，其母是英國人，混血兒吳嘉龍外型酷帥、一副健美體型，也擁有堅韌不拔的性格。不像前輩明星那般惜肉如金，吳嘉龍為演藝事業，完全不顧及尺度，因為他的軀體也是工具，只要作品好，沒什麼不能露的，在其父親的悉心培養和提攜下，在多部影視劇中都有露面，雖然戲份不多，但亮麗的外型讓群眾難忘。
data.name: 吳嘉龍

data.biography: 吴嘉龙是香港著名老演员吴耀汉之子，其母是英国人，混血儿吴嘉龙外型酷帅、一副健美体型，也拥有坚韧不拔的性格。不像前辈明星那般惜肉如金，吴嘉龙为演艺事业，完全不顾及尺度，因为他的躯体也是工具，只要作品好，没什么不能露的，在其父亲的悉心培养和提携下，在多部影视剧中都有露面，虽然戏份不多，但亮丽的外型让群众难忘。
data.name: 吴嘉龙

data.biography: Carl Ng ist ein Schauspieler und Model aus Hongkong. Er ist der Sohn von Richard Ng.
data.name: Carl Ng

data.biography:
Saima Nakano (中野 さいま, Nakano Saima, November 26) is a Japanese voice actress born in the city of Ageo, Saitama Prefecture who is affiliated with Stay Luck. She is half Egyptian and half Japanese, and is the second daughter of two sisters.

When she was in elementary school, she joined a theater company. She then became interested in voice acting and entered the anime song course at Yoyogi Animation Academy in Tokyo. She debuted as a voice actress in the first year of enrollment as the heroine Sato in the anime Ishida and Asakura. She then joined Sony Music Artists while attending school. She has appeared in many anime events outside Japan, such as Hong Kong, Taiwan, Malaysia, etc., showing off her own singing voice.

In the TV anime Aquarion Logos, besides voicing Shouko Iwagami, she was also in charge of the second insert song. She left Sony Music Artists in 2018 and moved to Stay Luck in 2019.

She is a close friend of voice actresses Yuki Nagaku, Mikako Izawa, Masumi Tazawa, and Risa Tsumugi. She is also in good terms with Minori Suzuki, Ari Ozawa, and Tomori Kusunoki.
data.name: Saima Nakano

data.biography:
Saima Nakano (中野 さいま, Nakano Saima, 26 de noviembre) es una actriz de voz japonesa nacida en la ciudad de Ageo, prefectura de Saitama, afiliada a Stay Luck. Es mitad egipcia y mitad japonesa, y es la segunda hija de dos hermanas.

Cuando estaba en la escuela primaria, se unió a una compañía de teatro. Luego se interesó en la actuación de voz e ingresó en un curso de canciones de anime en la Academia Yoyogi Animation de Tokio. Debutó como actriz de voz en el primer año de inscripción como la heroína Sato en el anime Ishida y Asakura. Luego se unió a Sony Music Artists mientras asistía a la escuela. Ha aparecido en numerosos eventos de anime fuera de Japón: Hong Kong, Taiwán, Malasia, etc., donde además ha interpretado canciones con su propia voz.

En el anime de televisión Aquarion Logos, además de interpretar el papel de Shouko Iwagami, también estuvo a cargo de la segunda insert song. Dejó Sony Music Artists en 2018 y se incorporó a Stay Luck en 2019.

Es amiga íntima de las actrices de voz Yuki Nagaku, Mikako Izawa, Masumi Tazawa y Risa Tsumugi. También se lleva bien con Minori Suzuki, Ari Ozawa y Tomori Kusunoki.
data.name: Saima Nakano

data.biography: 中野彩麻是日本的女性聲優，出身於日本埼玉縣上尾市。
data.name: 中野彩麻
